steps: Following designated treatment, wash cells three times with DMEM followed by the application of 0.5 mL of homogenization buffer supplemented with proteinase and phosphatase buffer. Homogenisation Buffer: %s %s
Gently detach cells with cell scraper.
Separate 50 µL of total homogenate (TH) and lyse with *TNE lysis buffer. TNE lysis buffer: %s %s
Centrifuge remaining volume of TH at 1000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes , collect the supernatant.

Further centrifuge the supernatant for 20000 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes to collect the precipitate as crude lysosomal fraction (CLF). Lyse the CLF with *TNE lysis buffer, and prepare lysates for western blot. TNE lysis buffer: %s %s
creator: Jane Balster
